fields.label: Have you paid your yearly contribution for last year?

options.label: I am a new joining member.

fields.label: Compulsory for ALL TRAINING MEMBERS. Please Pay this year's contribution fee.
fields.subtext:
- **For Students/Azubis:**  **50€ only** (i.e. less than 5€ a month)

- **For Others:**  **100€**

---

**Payment via PayPal:**

📧 [nftmunich@gmail.com](mailto:nftmunich@gmail.com)

**Subject:** `NFT Yearly Contribution 2025_your_name_email`

---

### 📌 **Note:**
We are a team **without sponsors or any income**. Therefore, we have to rely on **your support** to function financially.

We work as efficiently as possible. Your contributions help us cover:

- Upcoming matches
- Ground bookings
- Programs and logistics
- Training materials (footballs, Trikots, etc.)

At the end of the year, we will **email you the yearly balance sheet**.

> ⚠️ **Please note:** Paying the contribution **does not guarantee** a spot in the squad. Squad selection will be a sporting decision.

---

### **Please pay the yearly contribution.**
**Deadline: June**

---

### **PS:**
Everybody is welcome to play and train with us. You don't need to pay, except for the fees we incur for ground bookings on weekends, as we don't have a budget for it yet. We are looking for more affordable solutions.
Regarding our contribution fee: There is an option to opt out only in exceptional cases. Each case will be reviewed and decided by the management team. If you have a genuine problem, please feel free to reach out; we are a family.
If you don't pay the contribution fee, we won't be able to include you in events, friendlies, or tournaments, as our financial resources are used for those. The contribution is solely for that purpose.

---

FAZIT: PLAYING FOOTBALL WITH US DOESN'T COST MONEY 🙂

fields.label: Dear team, We are hosting the prestigious 8th edition of the NRNA Germany Football Cup in Munich on the 6th of September. We expect to host a minimum of 18 teams (men’s and women’s) and around 1,000 guests. This will only be possible with your help and commitment.
fields.subtext: Every registered member must be available on that day — that’s a given.

fields.label: Other possible commitments (please read carefully and think thoroughly before selecting one or more options):

options.label: I will bring my family, friends, and everyone I know on the tournament day. I will also promote the event regularly through my social media — this is expected from all of us.
options.value: I will bring my family, friends, and everyone I know on the tournament day. I will also promote the event regularly through my social media.

options.label: I want to contribute financially to the tournament (cash or PayPal: nftmunich@gmail.com). You can also ask your friends and family to support us as much as possible.
options.value: I want to contribute financially to the tournament.

options.label: I will bring in sponsors and connect them to the team asap (email: nftmunich@gmail.com).
options.value: I will bring in sponsors and connect them to the team asap

options.label: I will take at least a couple of days off prior to the tournament and dedicate my time to on-field preparations. (Or you can ask friends to help with this.)
options.value: I will take at least a couple of days off prior to the tournament and dedicate my time to on-field preparations.

options.label: I want to be a full-time volunteer for tournament preparation. Requirements: You'll be given a 2-hour task each week starting in June (or more if you can). This can be offline (e.g., writing letters, making posters, writing certificates etc) or on-field (e.g., buying or collecting logistics etc).
options.value: I want to be a full-time volunteer for tournament preparation.

options.label: I want to be actively involved in the tournament preparation as part of the Task Force. Requirements: You must be available for at least half a day each week (most likely on weekends), be willing to contribute financially, and accept the possibility of bearing financial loss (up to €1000 per person). Some committed individuals have already joined. If you're interested, we will contact you. Please note: this is a significant commitment, and we completely understand if you cannot take it on.
options.value: I want to be actively involved in the tournament preparation as part of the Task Force.

fields.label: What specific skills do you have that we can use for the event?
fields.subtext: For example: we need photographers, videographers, graphic designers, DJs, Medical personnel etc.

fields.label: Do you have any suggestions for the tournament? What kind of tournament would you like to see in Munich? What more you can offer? We are always open for suggestions :)
Are you interested in a managerial Role in the Team? Like managing Logistics, events, team etc.
What do you find different/good/bad in our team?
Other. If you think, anything is missing.
